text:
- **src/route_recall.rs** (NEW, ~228 lines): `cosine()`, `guide_repr()` (title+summary), `recall_candidates(embedder, guides, claims, top_k, tau)`; 7 unit tests.
   - **src/doctor.rs** (NEW, ~910 lines incl tests, on branch wiki-doctor): wiki consolidation; single-linkage clustering at tau=0.65; LLM confirm+merge; citation preservation.
